title: phoebe pallida subsp. pallida
intro: Phoebe pallida subsp. pallida, also known as Chinese phoebe or Chinese cedar, is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phoebe pallida subsp. pallida include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Phoebe pallida subsp. pallida include teas, infusions, and decoctions made from its leaves and branches, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional Chinese medicine.
